title: OpenRouter Relay
summary: The coast learned to send zero-memory messages through the relay room.

title: App Porch
summary: The first visible browser entrance opened at the coast.

title: Release Tools
summary: Snapshot and fixed Git HEAD release export tools were added.

title: Starsea Black Gold
summary: The App Porch gained its deep blue gold starsea visual identity.

title: Room Doors
summary: The porch gained clickable room doors and static room pages.

title: Memory Coast First Shelf
summary: The first visible memory shelf opened inside Memory Coast.

title: Archive Room First Shelf
summary: The archive gained its first shelf for releases, blueprints, safety ropes, and first echoes.

title: App Core Frontend Shell
summary: A separate frontend shell began the migration toward a real app structure.

title: Status API
summary: The App Core began showing live server status through a safe browser API.

title: Release Manifest API
summary: The App Core gained a safe backend release manifest and local zip time capsule list.
